{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40293", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Description
When OpenFGA is configured to use preshared-key authentication with the built-in playground enabled, the local server includes the preshared API key in the HTML response of the /playground endpoint. The /playground endpoint is enabled by default and does not require authentication. It is intended for local development and debugging and is not designed to be exposed to production environments.


### Am I Affected?
You are affected if you meet each of the following preconditions:
* You are running OpenFGA with --authn-method preshared, and
* The playground is enabled, and
* The playground endpoint is accessible beyond localhost or trusted networks.

### Fix
Upgrade to OpenFGA v1.14.0, or disable the playground by running `./openfga run --playground-enabled=false.`", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00286, "percentile": 0.20501}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-08T21:51:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40293"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T21:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-08T21:51:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openfga/openfga/security/advisories/GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5", "https://github.com/openfga/openfga/releases/tag/v1.14.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40293", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openfga/openfga/security-advisories/GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openfga/openfga", "summary": "OpenFGA: Unauthenticated playground endpoint discloses preshared API key in HTML response", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:48:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-68m9-983m-f3v5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.14.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openfga/openfga"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.1.4, <= 1.13.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenFGA: Unauthenticated playground endpoint discloses preshared API key in HTML response
